title: ostericum maximowiczii f. australe
intro: Ostericum maximowiczii f. australe, also known as Korean angelica, is a variety of the Ostericum maximowiczii plant, native to East Asia. It is a type of perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Korean angelica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving circulation, as well as having antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. In herbal preparations, Korean angelica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed raw in salads or used in cooking.
